overview: Jeskai Artifacts is a Standard tempo deck that leverages artifact synergies to establish early board presence and generate consistent card advantage. By cycling threats through Repurposing Bay and amplifying artifact triggers with Simulacrum Synthesizer, the deck maintains pressure while protecting its resources. United Battlefront serves as a pivotal board-clearing tool to reset unfavorable states and secure late-game swings.
win_conditions: Overwhelming the opponent with repeated artifact creature triggers
Using United Battlefront to clear opposing boards while preserving your artifact synergies
Generating sustained card advantage through Repurposing Bay recursion

keep_criteria: Hands with two or more low-cost artifacts
Early interaction paired with a ramp or draw engine
Simulacrum Synthesizer alongside cheap artifact enablers
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking artifact synergy or interaction

early_game: Play cheap artifacts to trigger Simulacrum Synthesizer
Establish a minimal board presence to apply pressure
Use early interaction to disrupt opponent's game plan
mid_game: Activate Repurposing Bay to recycle dead cards into threats
Scale artifact synergies to outpace opponent's development
Hold up mana for counterspells to protect key permanents
late_game: Cast United Battlefront to wipe opposing boards and swing with your artifacts
Leverage card advantage from Repurposing Bay to refill your hand
Close out games with repeated artifact triggers and combat damage

key_cards.name: Simulacrum Synthesizer
key_cards.notes: Prioritize playing cheap artifacts before or alongside it to maximize trigger value and board presence.

key_cards.name: Repurposing Bay
key_cards.notes: Use it to dig for answers or recycle played artifacts back into your hand for repeated value.

key_cards.name: United Battlefront
key_cards.notes: Hold until opponent commits multiple threats, then cast to clear their board while your artifacts survive or trigger favorably.

sequencing_tips: Trigger Simulacrum Synthesizer before combat to maximize value
Activate Repurposing Bay after opponent commits resources to the board
Cast United Battlefront on your turn to immediately follow up with artifact attacks
Hold up colored mana for interaction before committing to artifact plays

matchups.advice: Ramp quickly and use United Battlefront to reset their board while preserving your artifact triggers.
Go wide with artifacts and use Repurposing Bay to outvalue their hand traps and removal.
Race with artifact pressure and time United Battlefront to clear their value engines.
